messages.content:
A company is considering several Customer Relationship Management (CRM) providers and wants to understand what customizations each platform can offer. What is a good indicator of a CRM software’s customization capability?


the amount of user traffic the CRM platform can handle


the quality of the user interface and user experience


the robustness of the Application Programming Interface (API)


the market share held by the CRM platform provider
the robustness of the Application Programming Interface (API)

An Accenture client is currently using Salesforce as its Customer Relationship Management (CRM) solution. The client would like to implement an AI application to help predict future customer behavior.

Which approach takes advantage of Salesforce's capabilities?


Asking Salesforce to develop a custom AI application as part of its standard offering.


Integrating the AI application directly into the Salesforce framework.


Running the AI application on a separate server and uploading the results to Salesforce daily.


Contracting with the AI application's developer to build a standalone solution.
Integrating the AI application directly into the Salesforce framework.

Which two companies are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business?


Google and Instagram


Oracle and Workday


IBM and Cisco


Facebook and Twitter
Oracle and Workday are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business.

Which two companies are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business?


Google and Instagram


Oracle and Workday


IBM and Cisco


Facebook and Twitter
Oracle and Workday are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business.

Which two companies are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business?


Google and Instagram


Oracle and Workday


IBM and Cisco


Facebook and Twitter
Oracle and Workday are among the "Big Six" enterprise platform partners used by Accenture's Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) business.

A customer uses an app to order pizza for delivery. Which component includes aspects of the customer's interaction with an enterprise platform?


Data


Experience


Customer Interface


Core Processing
Experience and Customer Interface both include aspects of the customer's interaction with an enterprise platform.

A new Accenture client is looking for a platform that will help them in hiring for critical roles and decreasing attrition. Which Accenture tool will help the client select the best type of platform for overcoming these challenges?


SynOps


myConcerto


DevOps


myIndustry
myConcerto is the Accenture tool that helps clients select the best type of platform for their needs and requirements.

Which type of service offers a preconfigured testing environment for application developers to create new software applications?


Network as a Service (NaaS)


Software as a Service (SaaS)


Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)


Platforms as a Service (PaaS)
Platforms as a Service (PaaS) offers a preconfigured testing environment for application developers to create new software applications.

A company is struggling to keep track of its transactional information, sales opportunities, and conduct effective marketing campaigns.

Which platform is designed to help the company with this scenario?


Facebook


Salesforce


Apple iOS


Amazon Web Services
Salesforce is designed to help companies with scenarios such as struggling to keep track of its transactional information, sales opportunities, and conduct effective marketing campaigns.
